creator: benjamin.podszun@gmail.com
text:
Plus: Are you migrating from 0.8.x or is this a clean installation?
In other words: Are you hitting (potential/possible) migration issues by
chance?


On Fri, Feb 7, 2014 at 11:14 PM, Benjamin Podszun <
benjamin.podszun@gmail.com> wrote:

> How can I help?
>
> For me this works fine, but I've only tested gmail.com/GTalk so far.
> BUT I also ran the testsuite from the IM Observatory, which tested my s2s
> setup/connected to the s2s port.
>
> Are you sure that this is not a configuration issue? Is there any way for
> me to support you/to help track down the problem?
>
>
> On Fri, Feb 7, 2014 at 11:03 PM, David Thiel <lx@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
>> I've tested the most recent patch with the updated luasec. s2s is still
>> non-functional; users on external servers never appear in the roster or
>> show up as being online.
>>
>
>
